library.name: hls.js
library.description: HLS.js — JavaScript HLS client used by the FastPix web player for adaptive playback. Vendored self-contained ESM build (upstream dist/hls.mjs) saved as hls.js and loaded via native import().

library.name: @fastpix/resumable-uploads
library.description: FastPix resumable chunked upload SDK used by the activity edit form upload widget. Vendored self-contained ESM build (upstream dist/uploads.mjs) saved as uploads.js and loaded via native import().
